items.title: 3 Volatile Stocks with Open Questions
items.description: Market swings can be tough to stomach, and volatile stocks often experience exaggerated moves in both directions. While many thrive during risk-on environments, many also struggle to maintain investor confidence when the ride gets bumpy.

items.title: Forget the 2.8% Social Security Increase. These Aristocrats Pay You 4% to 7% More Annually
items.description: The Social Security Administration announced in October that beneficiaries will receive a 2.8% cost-of-living adjustment (COLA) in 2026, following a 2.5% increase in 2025. While these adjustments help protect purchasing power for 71 million Americans, dividend growth stocks have historically delivered substantially higher annual increases. items.title: The Bubble Everyone Sees - And The One I'm Preparing For
items.description: Are we in a market bubble? Read why investors should recognize risks and consider diversification.
